name: task-manager-backend
description: Simple Express and MongoDB backend for MERN Task Manager App

scripts.predev: for pid in $(lsof -t -i:5001); do ppid=$(ps -o ppid= -p $pid | tr -d ' '); if [ -n "$ppid" ] && [ "$ppid" -ne 1 ]; then kill -9 $ppid $pid 2>/dev/null || true; else kill -9 $pid 2>/dev/null || true; fi; done
